case_title: JUAN D VELASCO VS. MANUEL ISBEL CABEZAS et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,588.00 FILED BY VELASCO, JUAN D AS TO DEFENDANT CABEZAS, MANUEL ISBEL HANSEN, LAURA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF MATTER SATISFIED THROUGH ARBITRATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELASCO, JUAN D AS TO DEFENDANT CABEZAS, MANUEL ISBEL
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CABEZAS, MANUEL ISBEL HANSEN, LAURA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING - GRANTED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT LAURA HANSEN, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE FILED AGAINST SECOND DEFENDANT ON 7/24/14. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED JUN-13-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CABEZAS, MANUEL ISBEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-25-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
